    Index

    A D E M N S T W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    AlertSystem - Class in apps
    Module for managing user notifications.
    AlertSystem() - Constructor for class apps.AlertSystem
    Constructor for AlertSystem class.
    apps - package apps
    Application layer containing the core notification system context.
    Available Services - Section in package apps
     
    Available Services - Section in package services
     

    D

    displayLog() - Method in class apps.AlertSystem
    Displays all sent messages for the session in descending order with most recent messages first.

    E

    EmailService - Class in services
    Notification platform that allows for sending messages to terminal output via email medium.
    EmailService() - Constructor for class services.EmailService
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class apps.AlertSystem
    Application entry point for demonstrating simulated notification system.

    N

    NotificationMedium - Interface in services
    Interface that allows for delivery of notification messages to terminal output through different platforms.
    notifyUser(String) - Method in class apps.AlertSystem
    Sends a message to the terminal output through the current active notification platform.

    S

    send(String) - Method in class services.EmailService
    Sends a message as an email to terminal output.
    send(String) - Method in interface services.NotificationMedium
    Sends a notification message as requested medium to terminal output.
    send(String) - Method in class services.SMSService
    Sends a message as an SMS to terminal output.
    send(String) - Method in class services.WhatsAppService
    Sends a message as a WhatsApp message to terminal output.
    services - package services
    Service layer containing notification delivery implementations.
    setMedium(NotificationMedium) - Method in class apps.AlertSystem
    Changes the notification medium to chosen platform.
    SMSService - Class in services
    Notification platform that allows for sending messages to terminal output via SMS message medium.
    SMSService() - Constructor for class services.SMSService
     

    T

    toString() - Method in class services.EmailService
    Overrides the default string method to detail just the medium name.
    toString() - Method in class services.SMSService
    Overrides the default string method to detail just the medium name.
    toString() - Method in class services.WhatsAppService
    Overrides the default string method to detail just the medium name.

    W

    WhatsAppService - Class in services
    Notification platform that allows for sending messages to terminal output via WhatsApp medium.
    WhatsAppService() - Constructor for class services.WhatsAppService
